content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Tram". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/116/A
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, which is the number of stops. Then n lines follow, each containing two integers a and b, which are the number of passengers that leave and enter the tram at the current stop.
content.outputFormat: The maximum number of passengers that were in the tram at the same time.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Keep track of the current number of passengers and update it after each stop. Keep track of the maximum number of passengers seen so far.

code.Python3:
n = int(input())
max_passengers = 0
curr_passengers = 0
for _ in range(n):
    a, b = map(int, input().split())
    curr_passengers += b - a
    if curr_passengers > max_passengers:
        max_passengers = curr_passengers
print(max_passengers)
